findings.summary: Product "clientcare-billing-recovery" has 100% done BUILD_QUEUE.json (10 steps) and zero documented backlog in its PRODUCT_HOME — the factory has nothing left to build here.
findings.proposed_solution: Chair should interview the founder for this product's next real priorities (D8) and have Architect write them into docs/products/clientcare-billing-recovery/PRODUCT_HOME.md under a Backlog/Remaining Work heading so the planner (services/build-queue-planner.js) can turn them into queue steps.
findings.chair_reasoning: product scope/priority is a business decision, not a technical one — routed to founder per D8, not auto-approved
